Address: 11, H(A) Block, H Block, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Unique fitness studio in H Block offering both conventional gym training and specialised Bhangra fitness classes. Services include strength training, cardio, HIIT, and Bhangra group workout sessions (Punjabi dance-based cardio). Open Mon–Sat 5:30 AM–8 PM. Well-maintained equipment with proper HVAC (air conditioning/ventilation). Not overcrowded — easy access to all equipment.
Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 117 reviews. Completely unique in Sri Ganganagar — the ONLY gym offering Bhangra fitness classes alongside conventional training. Bhangra batch is extremely effective for weight loss and body shaping per member feedback. Clean, hygienic, positive-energy environment. Trainers are professional and supportive. H Block is one of SGN's prime residential and commercial zones. No crowding ensures better equipment access than city-centre gyms.

Address: 6, Radheshyam Road, near Monalisa Showroom, H Block, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: One of Sri Ganganagar's biggest gyms by size and machine count. Services include weight training, strength training, cardio (separate section), personal training, and structured diet/training programming. Two daily sessions: morning (6–10 AM) and evening (5–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Serves both men and women with dedicated guidance for each. Full diet charts and personalised training programs provided.
Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 111 reviews. Described as 'biggest gym in SGNR by size and machines.' Separate dedicated cardio section is a key facility differentiator. Trainers provide complete diet charts alongside workout programs — a value-add not all SGN gyms offer. Budget-friendly pricing. Located on Radheshyam Road near Monalisa Showroom in the H Block commercial area, one of SGN's busiest stretches.

Address: Chahal Chowk, Bank Colony, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Huge multi-purpose gym at Chahal Chowk, Bank Colony. Services include weight training, bodybuilding, cardio, personal training, and general fitness for all age groups and both genders. Two daily sessions: morning (6 AM–12 PM) and evening (4–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Spacious floor with almost every possible machine available. Floor trainers guide members on machine usage and proper form.
Insights: 4.7/5 Google rating with 77 reviews. Founder Yashweer Gupta (confirmed by name in a member review) has deep knowledge in bodybuilding and fitness. Described as having the 'largest gym in the region in terms of equipment and area.' Clean, friendly atmosphere welcoming all demographics. Inclusive for young/old, male/female. Noted as missing a proper dumbbell rack — an operational gap. Bank Colony location provides central accessibility.

Address: 7-L Block, Radheyshyam Kothi Road, above EasyDay, L Block, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Sri Ganganagar's largest and most luxurious gym spread across 2 floors. Offers cardiovascular training, personal training, yoga, Zumba, aerobics, functional training, body toning, and abs classes. Hygienic locker rooms, changing rooms, CCTV, and parking. Open Mon–Sat 5 AM–11 PM, Sun 5–11 AM. 44,000+ Instagram followers (@asquare_fitness). Supplement store on-site.
Insights: Established 2019. Ranked #1 gym in Sri Ganganagar on Justdial (4.8/5, 689 ratings) and Google (4.8/5, 682 reviews). Self-branded 'The Luxurious Body Bar — Best & Biggest Gym In City.' 44K Instagram followers. Featured in 5bestincity.com top 5 gyms of SGN. Located above EasyDay supermarket on the prime L Block commercial road. One of Rajasthan's top-tier Tier-2 city gyms by reputation and volume of reviews.

Address: 3B-9, Meera Marg, Jawahar Nagar, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Large premium gym in Jawahar Nagar with spacious floor area and a full range of workout machines. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, bodybuilding, and personal coaching. Registered as a gym, fitness centre, and educational institution. Two daily sessions: morning (6–10 AM) and evening (4–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Exceptional trainer-to-member ratio ensures personal attention.
Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 168 reviews — one of the top-rated gyms in Sri Ganganagar. Members describe a gym where the trainer ratio makes it feel like a personal trainer for each person. Equipment in very well condition per reviews. Registered as an educational institution in addition to gym, suggesting a formal training certification programme. Located on Meera Marg in the heart of Jawahar Nagar residential zone.

Address: Jassa Singh Road, near Basanti Chowk, Hardeep Colony, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Modern, clean fitness centre in Hardeep Colony. Services include strength training, cardio, HIIT, functional training, and personalised coaching. Two daily sessions: morning (5:30–10:30 AM) and evening (4–9:30 PM), Mon–Sat. All modern machines, spacious floor, and a highly motivated training community. Trainer Kapil cited by members for outstanding support.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 105 reviews. Trainer Kapil is singled out in multiple reviews for keeping the gym running smoothly and providing consistent support. Positioned as a premium-quality neighbourhood gym in Hardeep Colony. Members describe it as delivering excellence in training, discipline, and results. Professional coaches and positive energy cited consistently. One of the few gyms in SGN to achieve 100+ reviews with a perfect 5-star score.

Address: 7A-7, Meera Marg, opposite Indira Vatika, Jawahar Nagar, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Full-service gym specialising in bodybuilding and general fitness with imported international equipment. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, bodybuilding coaching, and personal training. Two daily sessions: morning (6 AM–12 PM) and evening (4–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Also operates as a medical clinic, suggesting physiotherapy or wellness services on-site.
Insights: 4.5/5 Google rating with 187 reviews — highest review count on Meera Marg, Jawahar Nagar. Imported international equipment is a strong differentiator in Sri Ganganagar's gym market. Well-knowledgeable trainers with deep bodybuilding expertise. Also registered as a medical clinic, indicating physiotherapy integration. One of the most established gyms in the Jawahar Nagar belt with a loyal member base.

Address: Gagan Path Road, opposite Ganga Palace, Vinayak Vihar, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Clean, well-equipped gym in Vinayak Vihar. Services include strength training, cardio, bodybuilding, squat racks, free weights, and personal coaching. Two daily sessions: morning (6–10 AM) and evening (4–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Wide variety of machines including squat racks. Supportive, motivating community environment.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 43 reviews. Members praise the top-notch equipment variety including squat racks, a well-maintained clean environment, and expert-level coaching. Trainer pushes members to maximize their physique potential. Self-branded as 'Best Gym In Sri Ganganagar.' Located near Ganga Palace on Gagan Path Road in Vinayak Vihar — a growing residential area of SGN.

Address: Gali Number 2, Shankar Colony, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Well-equipped, spacious gym in Shankar Colony. Services include strength training, cardio, weight training, personal training, and customised workout plans. Two daily sessions: morning (5:30–11:30 AM) and evening (4–9 PM), Mon–Sat. Experienced, supportive trainers available for form correction and personalised programming.
Insights: 4.9/5 Google rating with 82 reviews. Members consistently describe a clean, spacious environment with top-quality machines and experienced trainers. One of the best-rated neighbourhood gyms in Shankar Colony area of SGN. Trainers provide customised workout plans and proper form guidance. Fully satisfied member base per review tone.

Address: 2nd Floor, Vrindavan Vihar, above Momomia 105, opposite Bihani Children Academy, Vinayak Vihar, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Premium fitness centre on the 2nd floor in Vrindavan Vihar. Services include personal training, group fitness classes, cardio equipment, strength training, and nutrition guidance. Open Mon–Sat 5 AM–10 PM. All brand-new modern technology equipment. Pocket-friendly charges with a high-quality, hygienic environment. Trainers treat members like family.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 63 reviews. Established 2022 per 5bestincity.com. All equipment is brand new — modern technology, excellent hygiene. Members describe the experience as 'wow' and trainers as brothers. Located in Vinayak Vihar opposite Bihani Children Academy. Pocket-friendly pricing is a key differentiator in the Vinayak Vihar area. Registered as a fitness centre with a focused approach on personal training and nutrition.

Gym Name: Olympia Shape Up Gym & Fitness Zone
Address: 4-B-9, near Meera Chowk, 5G Choti, Jawahar Nagar, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Air-conditioned full-service gym near Meera Chowk, Jawahar Nagar. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, aerobics, and personal training. Largest cardio and aerobics hall in the area. Friendly, disciplined trainers. Open Mon–Sat 5:30 AM–9 PM. Also registered as a service (wellness) establishment.
Insights: 4.3/5 Google rating with 124 reviews. Noted for having the largest cardio and aerobics hall in SGN. AC environment. Gets very crowded at peak evening hours — capacity management is a noted challenge. Trainers are disciplined and good though available equipment may be stretched at peak times. Budget-friendly positioning attracts high footfall. Located at the central 5G Choti area near Meera Chowk.

Address: Street Number 7, near Khetarpal Mandir, above Bansal Hardware, Setia Colony, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Established neighbourhood gym in Setia Colony. Services include weightlifting, cardio, group exercise classes, and separate timing slots for ladies. Two daily sessions: morning (6 AM–12 PM) and evening (4–10 PM), Mon–Sat. Trainers provide individual attention to every client and support fitness journeys for beginners and experienced athletes.
Insights: 4.5/5 Google rating with 82 reviews. Featured in 5bestincity.com Top 5 Gyms in Sri Ganganagar. Well-known and well-established gym serving Setia Colony for several years. Separate timings for ladies is a valued differentiator. Trainers help get maximum results from every workout session. Good gym to start a fitness journey per member recommendations.

Address: B-01A, Main Road, Uttam Vihar, Prem Nagar, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Boutique strength and bodybuilding gym in Prem Nagar. Services include weight training, strength training, and personalised bodybuilding guidance. Open Mon–Thu 6 AM–9:30 PM; Fri–Sat split sessions (6:30–11 AM and 4:30–9:30 PM). Owner-trainer provides guidance like an elder brother, creating a family-like training atmosphere.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 11 reviews. Owner-trainer described as a big brother who guides members personally. Located in Uttam Vihar, Prem Nagar — a residential area in the western part of SGN. Described as 'famous place to achieve your goals' by members. Boutique owner-operated model fosters strong member loyalty and consistent results.

Address: 1, Suratgarh-Ganganagar Road, Homeland City, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Fitness centre serving the Homeland City residential zone on the Suratgarh-Ganganagar Road. Services include weight training, cardio, functional training, and personalised coaching. Open Mon–Sat 6 AM–8 PM. Experienced professional trainers providing guidance for both weight loss and muscle building.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 13 reviews. Positioned as the best gym in Homeland City — a rapidly growing residential township on the SGN–Suratgarh corridor. Professional, highly experienced trainers. Clean environment with a motivating workout atmosphere. Serves a newer residential demographic with limited nearby gym options, giving it a captive local market.

Address: Shop No. 84, Ashok Nagar-B, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Compact gym in the Ashok Nagar-B commercial area of Sri Ganganagar. Serves the local residential and commercial community with weight training and fitness services.
Insights: Listed on Google with 5.0/5 and 1 early review. New entrant in the Ashok Nagar-B market. Located in a commercial locality with good footfall. Early-stage gym building its member base. Phone line active: +91 95117 33530.

Address: Behind White House, near Old Radha Swami Satsang, Adarsh Colony, Suratgarh, Rajasthan 335804
Functionality Description: Fully AC luxury gym in Adarsh Colony, Suratgarh. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, personal training, and body transformation programs. Open Mon–Sat 6 AM–10 PM. Premium equipment, AC facility, and a clean, professional environment. Suratgarh's highest-rated fitness facility.
Insights: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating with 51 reviews — the best-rated gym in Suratgarh. Self-branded as a 'Luxury Gym and Fitness Centre.' Fully AC is a premium differentiator in Suratgarh where most gyms are non-AC. Suratgarh is an agricultural town of ~100,000 population located 50 km south of Sri Ganganagar. Serves the fitness-conscious population of a rapidly developing Tier-3 city.

Address: Behind HDFC Bank, Swami Vivekananda Nagar, Suratgarh, Rajasthan 335804
Functionality Description: Well-established gym behind HDFC Bank in Vivekananda Nagar, Suratgarh. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, and personal training. Open Mon–Sat 6 AM–10 PM. Owner known for friendly, approachable management. Clean facility with a great team of trainers.
Insights: 4.8/5 Google rating with 170 reviews — highest review count of any gym in Suratgarh, making it the most reviewed fitness centre in the city. Owner praised as a genuine friend to members. Members consistently describe it as the best gym in Suratgarh for trainer quality and environment. Located near HDFC Bank — a well-known landmark in Vivekananda Nagar. Strong community trust built over years of operation.

Address: BSNL Exchange Road, Swami Vivekananda Nagar, Suratgarh, Rajasthan 335804
Functionality Description: Well-established fitness studio in Vivekananda Nagar, Suratgarh. Services include gym workouts, strength training, bodybuilding, cardio, and personal training. Open Mon–Sat 5 AM–10 PM. Affordable fee structure with 100% discipline enforced. Professional trainers with strong knowledge of bodybuilding and fitness for both youth and adults. Accepts members from age 15+.
Insights: 4.5/5 Google rating with 137 reviews — highest review count among non-premium gyms in Suratgarh. Long-established gym with a loyal community base. 100% disciplined training environment is a key differentiator. Affordable fees attract high footfall from students and young professionals. Good music system and overall positive vibes cited consistently. Competes with Iconic Fitness and Shape Up for Suratgarh's gym market.

Address: 54, E Block, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Full-service fitness studio in E Block. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, science-based bodybuilding coaching, and certified personal training. Open Mon–Sat 6:15 AM–10 PM. Certified coaches with deep, science-backed fitness knowledge. Clean, modern environment.
Insights: 4.5/5 Google rating with 75 reviews. Coach is specifically praised for 'certified, science-based knowledge' — a credibility signal rarely highlighted in SGN gym reviews. Members describe it as 'best gym in Sri Ganganagar' with well-maintained equipment and clean environment. Affordable pricing with professional guidance. E Block is a central residential and commercial zone in SGN. Standout for its evidence-based training approach vs. traditional Indian gyms.

Address: 3rd Floor, Balaji Mart, near Durga Mandir Road, Prem Nagar, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Premium gym on the 3rd floor of Balaji Mart in Prem Nagar. Services include weight training, bodybuilding, cardio, personal training, and competitive bodybuilding coaching. Open Mon–Sat 5:30 AM–11:30 PM, Sun 5:30–8 PM. Large floor space with changing room facilities and top-quality machines.
Insights: 4.5/5 Google rating with 13 reviews. Owner-trainer Saifee Rizvi holds the titles of 'Mr. Ganganagar' and 'Mr. Rajasthan' in bodybuilding — the only gym in SGN with a state-title-holding owner-trainer. Members credit Saifee Sir directly for helping them achieve their bodybuilding dream. Extremely late closing time (11:30 PM) is rare in SGN and caters to working professionals. One of the few gyms in Prem Nagar with a dedicated changing room.

Address: Old City, Sri Ganganagar, Rajasthan 335001
Functionality Description: Long-established neighbourhood gym in the Old City area of Sri Ganganagar. Services include weight training, cardio, strength training, and personalised fitness guidance. Open Mon–Sat 5 AM–8 PM. Owner is polite and a qualified trainer. Variety of daily exercise changes keeps training fresh and engaging.
Insights: 4.2/5 Google rating with 64 reviews. One of SGN's older gyms serving the Old City residential community. Owner is praised for polite and attentive nature. Trainer changes exercises daily to challenge members and prevent monotony — a progressive programming approach. Serves a traditional, established neighbourhood demographic in the historical part of Sri Ganganagar.

Address: near Durga Mandir, near SBI Bank, Padampur, Rajasthan 335041
Functionality Description: 24-hour gym in Padampur, a tehsil town in Sri Ganganagar district. Open 24 hours Mon–Sat, closed Sunday. Serves the Padampur residential and agricultural community with round-the-clock fitness access. Strength training and cardio equipment available.
Insights: 5.0/5 Google rating with 5 early reviews. Serves Padampur — a tehsil headquarter of Sri Ganganagar district, approx. 70 km southwest of the city. 24-hour operation is exceptionally rare for a Tier-3 township. Located near SBI Bank and Durga Mandir — landmark central location in Padampur. One of very few formal fitness centres in this rural tehsil market.

Address: Padampur-Gajsinghpur Road, near Girls' School, Padampur, Rajasthan 335041
Functionality Description: Fitness hub in Padampur serving the community along Padampur-Gajsinghpur Road. Services include gym workouts, strength training, cardio, and personal coaching. Open Mon–Sat 5:30 AM–11 PM, Sun 5:30 AM–11 PM (7 days). Head trainer Chandan Soni provides personalised fitness guidance.
Insights: 4.6/5 Google rating with 11 reviews. Open 7 days a week including Sundays — rare for a Padampur-area gym. Head trainer Chandan Soni specifically praised by name by members. Located on the Padampur-Gajsinghpur Road near the local girls' school, serving both Padampur town and surrounding villages. Part of the emerging rural fitness culture in Sri Ganganagar district's peripheral towns.
